title: Lever 4: Cross-asset spread signals (XAU/XAG, real-rate divergence, DXY)
why: A tradeable portfolio requires audit at the *portfolio* level (joint risk, weak-signal aggregation, correlation-conditional weighting). The implementation is straightforward once B0019a recognizes the blindspot and B0007 derives the appropriate threshold discipline.
value_rationale: M (downgraded from H in 2026-05-27 recalibration — only the implementation; recognition is B0019a. Transitively blocked on ≥3 Loop A `audit_passed` survivors which don't exist yet. Will revert to H the moment ≥3 survivors materialize)
scope: new `pipeline/portfolio_audit.py` consuming ≥3 per-strategy OOF parquets and reporting: (i) joint Sharpe at equal weights, (ii) HERC-CDaR weights (B0004 dependency), (iii) marginal contribution to risk per strategy, (iv) regime-conditional portfolio Sharpe. **Mandatory DA review** — inherits all pre-registered probe-distribution requirements from B0007.
